variants: Nizar M'barek, an expert in atmospheric sciences, currently resides in Arborstone Quay where he has made a significant impact in his field. In addition to his research, Nizar is an active member of the Palewake Codex Collectors, connecting with fellow enthusiasts who appreciate rare literature on atmospheric science.
